arabic: جُعْتُ بَعْدَ يَوْمٍ طَوِيلٍ مِنَ التَّجْوَالِ فَبَحَثْتُ عَنْ مَطْعَمٍ قَرِيبٍ. وَجَدْتُ مَطْعَمًا صَغِيرًا يُقَدِّمُ الأَكْلَ الْمَحَلِّيَّ التَّقْلِيدِيَّ. طَلَبْتُ مِنَ النَّادِلِ أَنْ يَنْصَحَنِي بِأَفْضَلِ الأَطْبَاقِ. جَرَّبْتُ حَسَاءَ الْعَدَسِ وَالْخُبْزَ الطَّازَجَ مَعَ الزَّيْتُونِ. كَانَ الطَّعَامُ لَذِيذًا وَالسِّعْرُ مُنَاسِبًا.
translation: Ogladnio sam nakon dugog dana lutanja i potražio sam obližnji restoran. Pronašao sam mali restoran koji nudi tradicionalnu lokalnu hranu. Zamolio sam konobara da mi preporuči najbolja jela. Probao sam sočivo u čorbi i svježi hljeb s maslinama. Hrana je bila ukusna, a cijena razumna.
translationEn: I got hungry after a long day of wandering and looked for a nearby restaurant. I found a small restaurant offering traditional local food. I asked the waiter to recommend the best dishes. I tried lentil soup and fresh bread with olives. The food was delicious and the price was reasonable.
